status: stopped on first invalid arm before Opus judging

failure.reason: The second provider tool result raised cumulative model-visible tool output to 6070 bytes, above the registered 6000-byte ceiling.

product_learning: Prompt-level output guidance is insufficient even when the miss is only 70 bytes. The successor uses the supported Codex tool_output_token_limit to truncate each built-in tool result before it is retained in context, while keeping the cumulative supervisor breaker.
post_failure_rule: Do not rerun the exposed case. Any successor must use a fresh replacement case and freeze tool_output_token_limit before inference.
